behavior_summary: Provides Tarna's small-scope NPC behaviors: an inspect/U8P_TARNA::look bark, time-of-day scheduling, proximity activity control, and a multi-branch conversation with a first-meeting helper.
U8P_TARNA::look (main) emits a short bark: shows the NPC's proper name when tarnaName is set, otherwise a generic guard bark.
U8P_TARNA::schedule maps the current time-of-day (FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod) to activity/timing constants used by the NPC; if no branch matches it calls METHOD::func133F as a fallback.

U8P_TARNA::enterFastArea and U8P_TARNA::leaveFastArea manage proximity: U8P_TARNA::enterFastArea (unless toranDead or NPC dead) launches an activity process (Npc::cSetActivity) when the player enters the fast trigger; U8P_TARNA::leaveFastArea resets a reference (FREE::resetRef) when the player leaves the fast area.

U8P_TARNA::use is the primary interaction process: it guards on toranDead, checks emergency/crisis flags (hydrosFree/pyrosFree/hasHeart) to possibly abort with urgent lines, builds and maintains a menu (local8) that includes personalized greetings if tarnaAvaName, conditionally adds options based on tarnaMet/tarnaJob/tarnaTenebraed/tarnaName, loops asking the player until they choose 'Goodbye.', and calls U8P_TARNA::func2DF7 for the initial first-meeting dialog.

U8P_TARNA::func2DF7 (helper) runs the first-meeting conversation: constructs name-based strings (uses getName), presents a question menu, handles strcmp branches for player replies, sets meeting-related flags (inferred tarnaMet and tarnaAvaName) and performs some spawn/call side-effects (likely to trigger animations/effects).
notable_control_flow: Early-guard pattern: multiple routines begin by checking toranDead (and Npc::isDead for proximity/scheduling) to skip interaction/behavior when Tarna is not active.

Scheduling switch: U8P_TARNA::schedule queries FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod and writes a small set of period-specific constants (local2, local1, local0, local3); if the period doesn't match any branch it invokes METHOD::func133F.

Conversation loop: U8P_TARNA::use initializes local8 to ['Goodbye.'], then uses MenuAdd/MenuRemove/MenuUnion to present dynamic choices and repeatedly Ask/SuspendAssign to capture local1 until the exit option is chosen.

First-meeting dispatch: when tarnaMet is false, U8P_TARNA::use calls U8P_TARNA::func2DF7 and then suspends; U8P_TARNA::func2DF7 sets meeting flags so future calls to U8P_TARNA::use follow the repeat-interaction path.
Proximity spawn/suspend: U8P_TARNA::enterFastArea spawns Npc::cSetActivity and then suspends the process (yields after starting the activity).
open_questions: What exact behavior does METHOD::func133F perform when called from U8P_TARNA::schedule (fallback scheduling)? (external, purpose unclear)
What side-effects do the raw spawn/addressof method calls in U8P_TARNA::func2DF7 trigger (METHOD::func091C, METHOD::func15E7)? They appear to drive animations/effects but this is inferred.
Which precise flags are written by U8P_TARNA::func2DF7 beyond tarnaMet and tarnaAvaName (SetFlag nodes present but mapping to symbolic names is partially inferred)?
Are there map-specific or state-dependent dialog branches tied to Npc::getMap == 0x03 and devonInRule that produce different behavior in certain regions (full intent unknown)?

main_function.name: U8P_TARNA::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player 'U8P_TARNA::look' (inspect) event for Tarna; emit a short bark that uses a named form when tarnaName is set and a generic form otherwise.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine's 'U8P_TARNA::look' / inspect action on this NPC.
Selects bark text by reading global flag tarnaName.

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::schedule
function_map.role: time-of-day scheduler mapping FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod() to activity/timing constants

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry/proximity handler: spawn Npc::cSetActivity(0x00, this) unless toranDead or NPC dead

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit/cleanup: calls FREE::resetRef to clear proximity reference

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::use
function_map.role: primary interaction/conversation process: guards, crisis-abort checks, greeting construction, dynamic menu loop and dispatch to first-meeting helper

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::func2DF7
function_map.role: first-meeting conversation helper: builds name-based strings, presents question menu, handles responses and sets meeting flags

internal_calls.purpose: Run the first-meeting dialog flow and set meeting-related flags (tarnaMet, tarnaAvaName inferred) so subsequent conversations follow the repeat path.

external_calls.purpose: Query current time-of-day period to select period-dependent U8P_TARNA::schedule constants.
Fallback/auxiliary scheduling operation when a time-of-day branch is not taken (exact effect external/unknown).
Start/change the NPC's immediate activity (spawned process) when the player enters proximity.
Reset/clear a proximity or registration reference for this NPC during fast-area exit cleanup.
Determine map context to gate certain dialog branches (e.g., behavior when map == 0x03).
Retrieve the player's name to build personalized greetings when tarnaAvaName is true.
Build name-embedded menu strings/options for first-meeting dialog.
Compute facing/direction values used in spawn/addressof method calls (likely for animation/facing side-effects).
Spawned method calls observed after dialog choices that likely trigger animations/effects; exact purpose unknown.

reads.name: toranDead
reads.likely_effect: Gate: prevents interaction, scheduling and proximity activity if true; used as an early-exit guard.

reads.name: tarnaName
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether Tarna is identified by name (affects U8P_TARNA::look bark and some greeting/menu options).

reads.name: tarnaMet
reads.likely_effect: Indicates whether the player has met Tarna before; used to choose first-meeting vs repeat conversation paths.

reads.name: tarnaJob
reads.likely_effect: Determines inclusion of a 'Tell me about your job' menu option.

reads.name: tarnaTenebraed
reads.likely_effect: Determines inclusion of Tenebrae-related dialog options.

reads.name: tarnaAvaName
reads.likely_effect: When true enables a personalized greeting that includes the player's name.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Part of an emergency/crisis check; increments a counter used to possibly abort conversation with urgent warning lines.

reads.name: pyrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Part of emergency/crisis checks; contributes to urgent-abort condition.

reads.name: hasHeart
reads.likely_effect: Part of emergency checks; contributes to aborting conversation with urgent warnings.

reads.name: devonInRule
reads.likely_effect: Used with Npc::getMap to short-circuit/dismiss conversation on a specific map (inferred).

writes.name: tarnaMet
writes.likely_effect: Set by first-meeting dialog (U8P_TARNA::func2DF7) to mark the player as having met Tarna so future interactions U8P_TARNA::use repeat dialog branches.

writes.name: tarnaAvaName
writes.likely_effect: Set to true when player provides a name (inferred from SetFlag nodes in U8P_TARNA::func2DF7) to enable personalized greetings.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides Tarna's small-scope NPC behaviors: an inspect/U8P_TARNA::look bark, time-of-day scheduling, proximity activity control, and a multi-branch conversation with a first-meeting helper.
